NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into by and between Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC No.: S1234567A) of 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 123456, and Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC No.: S2345678B) of 456 Serangoon Avenue, Singapore 234567, on this 15th day of October, 2023.

1. Confidential Information. The parties agree that all information disclosed under this Agreement shall be considered confidential. This includes, but is not limited to, business strategies, financial details, and any other data marked as confidential. No project status reports shall be shared without prior consent. Contact information such as phone numbers, including +65 9876 5432, and emails like tan.weiming@example.sg, are also deemed confidential.

2. Obligations. Both parties agree to use the confidential information solely for the purposes outlined in this Agreement and not for any personal gain or advantage. Disclosures are only permissible to those with a need to know. The SPA concerning the acquisition of shares in Fictional Holdings Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 202312345A) for SGD 500,000 shall remain subject to these confidentiality terms. The link https://example.sg/user/S 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 A provides access to additional confidential resources.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
